title: HYCHIKA 140W Detail Electric Sander, 13000 OPM Mouse Sander Efficient Dust Collection, with 12PCS Sanding Sheets, Ideal for Sanding Wood and Removing Rust and Paint
features: Excellent Sanding Performance: 140W pure copper motor, 13,000 OPM electric sander for sanding, paint and rust removal on wood, metal and plastics in tight spaces
Two Types of Dust Collection: 6-hole sandpaper with a new dust collection system with a dust bag and an adapter, which connects to the vacuum cleaner to make the dust collection more efficient
Compact Design: The detail sander has an ergonomic rubber palm rest and a compact, lightweight design for improved operator comfort and control
Hook and Loop Design: Hook and loop design of the base plate, with the matching sanding pads, to achieve quick and easy change
Sanding Pads: Equipped with three kinds of coarse, medium and fine sanding paper (4 x P80, 4 x P120, 4 x P240), which can meet the different needs of surface precision sanding
